title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
description: We're looking for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to lead our AI initiatives. You'll work on large-scale ML systems, including model training, deployment, and optimization. Experience with transformer models and NLP is preferred.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Join our infrastructure team! We're seeking a DevOps Engineer with strong Kubernetes and Docker expertise to manage our cloud infrastructure. You'll work on CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and monitoring solutions.

title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: We're building the next generation of web applications. We need a Senior Frontend Developer with expert-level React and TypeScript skills. You'll mentor team members and drive architectural decisions.

title: Backend Software Engineer
description: Help us build scalable backend systems processing millions of requests daily. Looking for an engineer with strong API design, database optimization, and microservices expertise.

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description: Join our lean team at a fast-growing startup! We need a Full-Stack Engineer who can wear multiple hats, shipping features quickly from frontend to backend.
